'''fonashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vectorcardiographic|vectorcardiographic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vectorcardiographic|vectorcardiographic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fonashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || fonashithi || fonashiji || fonashishi || fonashiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || fonashuthu || fonashuju || fonashushu || fonashuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || fonashuthu || fonashuju || fonashushu || fonashuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || fonashufthuf || fonashufjuf || fonashufshuf || fonashufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fonashethe || fonasheje || fonasheshe || fonasheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fonashotho || fonashojo || fonashosho || fonashoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fonashotho || fonashojo || fonashosho || fonashoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fonashofthof || fonashofjof || fonashofshof || fonashofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fonashïfthïf || fonashïfjïf || fonashïfshïf || fonashïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fonashïfthïf || fonashïfjïf || fonashïfshïf || fonashïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fonashïfthïf || fonashïfjïf || fonashïfshïf || fonashïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fonashïfthïf || fonashïfjïf || fonashïfshïf || fonashïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fonashæthæ || fonashæjæ || fonashæshæ || fonashækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fonashatha || fonashaja || fonashasha || fonashaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fonashatha || fonashaja || fonashasha || fonashaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fonashafthaf || fonashafjaf || fonashafshaf || fonashafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || fonashasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || fonashshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || fonashroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || fonashmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || fonashyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofonashnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofonashnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofonashnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofonashnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || fonanashasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || fonanashshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || fonanashroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || fonanashmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || fonanashyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofonanashnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofonanashnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofonanashnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofonanashnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || fenæshasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || fenæshshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || fenæshroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || fenæshmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || fenæshyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofenæshnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofenæshnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofenæshnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofenæshnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || fonfashasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || fonfashshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || fonfashroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || fonfashmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || fonfashyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofonfashnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofonfashnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofonfashnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofonfashnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
